message:
fix: rename file-hotspots flag and guard robot-file-beads dispatch

- Rename robot-file-hotspots flag to file-hotspots in the phase-three
  robot registry batch list for consistency with the actual flag name
- Guard dispatchRobotFlagOrExit for robot-file-beads so it is skipped
  when --file-hotspots is active, preventing double-dispatch conflict
- Clamp closedLimit to 0 in handleRobotFileBeads when a negative value
  is supplied, avoiding an out-of-bounds slice panic

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
